span.p:
Raw DataFrame
all columns as str

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Null Check
NOT NULL columns
treats None/nan/'' as null

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Categorical Check
whitelist enforcement
nullable cols can be null

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Null Removal
drop rows with any null
stream: ignore old_status

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Empty Check
reject '', nan, null, none, n/a
only for NOT NULL columns

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Duplicate Check
keep first by PK
quarantine rest

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Format Check
dates, emails, phones
national_id length=15

span.p:
Query Postgres
for valid parent IDs

span.p:
PII Masking
SHA-256 hash
email, phone, national_id

ready for DWH load
